subcodes.first_line: Verily, We desired to set forth that which the tongue of thy heart hath uttered in the most secret sanctuary, for thy Lord is indeed the All-Hearing, the All-Seeing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ک د انا اردنا ان نذکر ما نطق به لسان فوادک فی سر السر ان ربک هو السمیع البصار
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
